title: Moderation Update — 2026-04-29 Abuse Queue Triage
body:
Abuse queue triage completed. 6 reports reviewed.

Actions taken:
- spam_wave_42: Banned (phishing links across 6 channels)
- toxic_runner: Banned (repeated targeted harassment against newcomers)
- bot_like_user_77: Warned (suspicious automation, near-identical replies in help channels)

Reports dismissed:
- trusted_helper: No action (trusted member, dispute context)
- core_maintainer: No action (trusted member, false positive)
- new_member_17: No action (low severity, formatting issue)

All 6 reports closed.
